# Install `responsive-dialog` — Responsive Dialog (Sheet ↔ Modal)

> ResponsiveDialog — auto-switches between bottom Sheet (mobile) and centered Dialog (desktop) at the md breakpoint.

📚 Knowledge base : https://resource.rahmanef.com/llms.txt
📦 Slice detail   : https://resource.rahmanef.com/slices/responsive-dialog
🧠 JSON catalog   : https://resource.rahmanef.com/api/knowledge?slice=responsive-dialog
🤖 Prompt page    : https://resource.rahmanef.com/agents/responsive-dialog

## 1. Install

```bash
npx rahman-resources add responsive-dialog
# alias: npx rr add responsive-dialog
```

## 2. What it ships

- tags: `ui`, `dialog`, `modal`, `sheet`, `responsive`, `primitive`

## 3. Wire it up

Run `npx rr add responsive-dialog`. Drop-in for shadcn Dialog. Use <ResponsiveDialog><ResponsiveDialogTrigger>…</ResponsiveDialogTrigger><ResponsiveDialogContent>…</ResponsiveDialogContent></ResponsiveDialog>. On mobile renders as Sheet sliding from bottom; on desktop as centered Dialog. Threshold via useMediaQuery('(min-width: 768px)').

## Rules of engagement

- shadcn-only UI primitives. No raw `<button>` / `<dialog>` / native date or file inputs.
- 200-line hard cap per source file (extract neighbours when over).
- All Convex queries hit an index (`.withIndex(...)`); never bare `.collect()`.
- Public mutations/queries declare `args:` validators + authz.
- Full ruleset: https://resource.rahmanef.com/best-practice
